member.name: M:TipidMateMauiApp.Services.DatabaseService.HasMigratedToFirebaseAsync
member.summary: Returns true if SQLite data has already been migrated to Firebase.

member.name: P:TipidMateMauiApp.ViewModels.MainViewModel.ChartFilterHeader
member.summary: Header text shown above the filtered list on SummaryPage.

member.name: P:TipidMateMauiApp.ViewModels.MainViewModel.ChartFilteredTransactions
member.summary: Expenses for the current month, optionally filtered to one category. Used by SummaryPage's transaction list beneath the charts.

member.name: M:TipidMateMauiApp.ViewModels.MainViewModel.SetChartFilter(System.String)
member.summary: Set or clear the chart category filter. Pass null to show all expenses.

member.name: T:TipidMateMauiApp.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
